summary: Browser-based proof for Mission Control v3.0 Customer Zero pass. Tested 12 flows via Playwright against https://token-monetization.preview.emergentagent.com. Created fresh customer cz-browser-1780204931@example.com via /signup, walked through onboarding, verified billing, runtime registry, flight-deck, forgot-password, and login flows. Key findings: signup + auto-login + forgot-password + billing test-mode banner + flight-deck pending banner all work in browser. UI gaps confirmed: no Mint API Key UI on /app/runtime-validation, no MCP Agent Gateway customer panel, no dedicated Team/Members invite UI, demo=cpa query param appears ignored on /app/overview, /login form uses 'Username' label instead of 'Email' (works with email but is misleading UX for a fresh signup).

ui_bugs.issue: Field labeled 'Username' (input#username, type=text) instead of 'Email'. Fresh signup uses email; user must guess to enter email in Username field. Functionally works but is confusing UX for a new customer returning to the site.

Demo mode query param appears to NOT swap Executive Briefing content. Expected CPA headline 'Tax season pressure is dropping. One reconciliation needs you.' was NOT rendered; page shows the standard setup checklist (Your workforce is 36% set up). No visible 'Demo mode' indicator on the page.
Page does not contain the literal text 'Executive Briefing' — body text shows setup checklist instead. Cannot verify Executive Briefing card visually.

integration_issues.issue: Fresh signup creates account with email but /login asks for Username — discoverability gap for returning customer.

issues: Continue button stays disabled with no helper text indicating workspace name is required

ui_missing.finding: No customer-facing Team/Members/Invite UI found. /app/team, /app/members do not exist (render Welcome runtime-check modal). /app/settings has 'Workspace Management' link pointing to Super Admin panel only. Backend POST /api/workspaces/{id}/invites exists but no customer-facing invite screen.

/app/runtime-validation renders runtime status cards (OpenClaw/Hermes/Claude Code/Codex) but no 'Generate API Key' / 'Mint Key' CTA visible. Backend POST /api/agents/{id}/keys works but no customer-facing screen to mint MC_API_KEY.
No customer-facing Agent Gateway / MCP / Task router panel found in the UI. Backend service exists at /api/agent-gateway/{health,tasks} but no surfaced UI.

flow_results.FLOW_1_HOMEPAGE: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (scrollHeight=5294px, positioning copy visible, Start Free routes to /signup, VisionOps + PropControl footer links present)
flow_results.FLOW_2_SIGNUP: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (email cz-browser-1780204931@example.com + password + name + company + business_type=cpa accepted; auto-login redirected to /onboarding)
flow_results.FLOW_3_ONBOARDING: PARTIAL — Wizard step 1 requires workspace name (Continue disabled until filled). After filling, navigation continues. /app/overview does not literally render text 'Executive Briefing'; renders setup checklist instead.
flow_results.FLOW_4_LOGIN_LOGOUT: PASSED-IN-BROWSER for login (email accepted in Username field, redirected to /app). Logout button discovery was not completed due to time, but login + session survival across navigation works.
flow_results.FLOW_5_FORGOT_PASSWORD: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (success copy: 'If an account exists for that email, we have sent reset instructions.' rendered; no error, no 429)
flow_results.FLOW_7_BILLING: PASSED-IN-BROWSER (page loads, 'Stripe test/mock mode active' amber banner visible, Overview/Ledger/Usage/Buy Credits tabs visible, AI Workforce Health gauge visible). Did not click Buy due to time; balance update not verified in browser.
flow_results.FLOW_8_RUNTIME: PARTIAL — page renders 4 runtime cards with INSTALLED/RUNNING/AGENTS status. No Mint API Key UI visible (see ui_missing).
flow_results.FLOW_10_FLIGHT_DECK: PASSED-IN-BROWSER ('Installer build pending — use local build instructions' banner visible; Baseline Flight Deck v0.1.0 title; platform cards present)
flow_results.FLOW_11_DEMO_EXPERIENCE: FAILED-IN-BROWSER (?demo=cpa did not change Executive Briefing headline to CPA template; no demo mode indicator visible)
flow_results.FLOW_12_LONG_SESSION: NOT-TESTED (skipped to conserve testing budget — would need 10 minutes of idle observation)

action_items: Add 'Mint API Key' UI button on /app/runtime-validation (or dedicated agents page) — currently only backend POST /api/agents/{id}/keys is reachable.
Add a customer-facing Team / Members / Invite UI — backend POST /api/workspaces/{id}/invites exists with no UI.
Add a customer-facing MCP Agent Gateway panel surfacing /api/agent-gateway/tasks.
Wire ?demo=cpa / demo=law-firm / demo=pm / demo=home-services on /app/overview to actually swap Executive Briefing copy and show a visible Demo mode indicator.
Rename /login Username field label to Email (or accept both labels) so returning customers know to type their signup email.
Verify the /app/overview Executive Briefing card actually renders the heading text 'Executive Briefing' (current body text does not contain that string).
critical_code_review_comments: Inline-script CSP violation logged on every page load (Executing inline script violates the following Content Security Policy directive). Needs nonce or hash to clear console.
Login form discovers 'Username' but signup only collects 'Email' — UX mismatch. Either align the labels or store username==email at signup so customers don't get stuck.

success_rate.frontend: approx 60% — 6 of 12 flows PASSED, 2 PARTIAL, 1 FAILED, 3 UI-MISSING, 1 NOT-TESTED

test_credentials: Created fresh in browser: cz-browser-1780204931@example.com / ChangeMe!1234ABC (workspace 'Customer Zero Browser Co', business_type=cpa). Saved to /tmp/cz_creds.txt during run.
seed_data_creation: One new customer workspace created via real browser signup (Flow 2).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use a brand new unique-timestamp email for FLOW 2 (do not reuse cz-browser-1780204931). /login Username field accepts the signup email — type the full email into Username. Onboarding step 1 needs the workspace name filled before Continue enables. /app/overview body text does NOT include literal 'Executive Briefing' — search instead for the Workforce/Setup widgets. Demo query param ?demo=cpa does not swap copy currently. Flow 12 (10-min stability) was skipped — re-run if needed. Backend agent gateway, runtime key mint and invites need NEW customer-facing UI before this can be claimed as 'a stranger can do it via browser only'.
